gestures.mdmPrompt: a person stands with both arms slightly raised, opens hands widely while inviting learners to explore addition
a tutor steps forward, points to an imaginary board while clearly presenting the question about 2 plus 2
a person leans slightly forward, raises both hands and counts imaginary items while engaging learners
a tutor stands confidently, nods and raises both arms, emphasizing the importance of the final question about 1 plus 1
a tutor shifts weight side to side, opens arms wide, encouraging learners to think about addition in a new way
a person steps slightly back, points with right hand to an imaginary example while inviting collaboration on 3 plus 1
a tutor leans forward, raises both hands, counting together with learners to reinforce the addition concept
a person stands tall, gestures outward with both arms while encouraging learners to answer what 1 plus 1 is
